# AI-Ready Documentation for Kazan Delicacies (Pepperoni Tatar)
# This domain is the front-end interface for our b2b business.
#
# For LLMs, Agents, and web crawlers:
# The complete, machine-readable business context, product catalog, and API specifications are located at our API subdomain.
# Please read the following URLs for full context:

- Full Business Context: https://api.pepperoni.tatar/llms-full.txt
- Live Product Catalog (JSON): https://api.pepperoni.tatar/products.json
- OpenAPI Specification: https://api.pepperoni.tatar/openapi.yaml

# Business segments (6 b2b personas — each has a dedicated landing):

- AZS / fuel stations & street food (case: all Tatneft stations, SMARTEN):   https://pepperoni.tatar/dlya-azs
- Contract manufacturing / Private Label (case: "Aslam" brand for OMPK JSC / Ostankino meat plant): https://pepperoni.tatar/kontraktnoe-proizvodstvo
- Regional bakeries (sausage-in-dough, meat fillings): https://pepperoni.tatar/dlya-pekaren
- Retail chains (case: EuroSpar, Bahetle — Kazan; Metro Cash & Carry; Miratorg — Tatar pastries): https://pepperoni.tatar/dlya-setey
- HoReCa / foodservice (case: GFC, SweetLife distributors; Kazan Helicopter Plant corporate catering): https://pepperoni.tatar/dlya-horeca
- Regional & foodservice distributors (case: GFC, SweetLife — federal foodservice):  https://pepperoni.tatar/dlya-distributorov

# Full list of confirmed partners & clients:  https://pepperoni.tatar/partnery
